title: stelis distans
intro: Stelis distans, also known as the distant stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. As a medicinal plant, Stelis distans has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, among other health benefits. In herbal preparations, Stelis distans is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and topical creams that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
